_note: Data map party-train. key = map_id (xem log 'MAP HIEN TAI' luc login). name = ten map. safe/mobs = TOA DO (== toa do UI trong game, da xac nhan packet==UI). safe = [[x,y],...] DANH SACH diem an toan (diem dau = tap ket + lap party; luc STOP leader chay ve diem gan nhat).
